title: Make the signup form accessible and mobile-friendly
instruction: The existing SignupForm has unlabeled inputs, poor focus states, and overflows on small screens. Add associated <label>s and aria attributes, visible focus styles, inline validation messages wired via aria-describedby, and make the layout usable at 360px width. Do not change the form fields or submission logic.

criteria.guidance: Are labels, focus states, and small-screen layout genuinely improved and accessible?
Are the original fields and submit behavior preserved?
